title: Bound passive statement processing
description: Process supported statements within advertised CPU, memory, disk, decompression, and time limits and reject over-limit content before mutation.
target: On the supported release host, each of the three qualified fixtures previews within 5 seconds and 256 MiB peak resident memory; every adapter advertises hard size, page, record, nesting, decompression, and processing-time limits; one-over-limit tests fail before LEDGER mutation.
load_condition: Cold-process preview of each qualified fixture plus adversarial fixtures at and immediately beyond every published adapter limit.
measurement: Published-binary wall-clock and peak-RSS measurements, boundary tests, cancellation tests, and proof that over-limit runs create no committable manifest or LEDGER transaction.
rationale: Malformed local documents can exhaust a host even without network or active content.
